title: Balanced Scorecard Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Balanced Scorecard skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

documented_organizational_strategy.description: Documented organizational strategy, mission, and vision statement

financial_performance_data.description: Financial performance data and targets (revenue, margin, cost, return metrics)

customer_performance_data.description: Customer performance data (satisfaction scores, retention rates, market share, NPS)

internal_process_performance.description: Internal process performance data (cycle times, quality metrics, throughput rates)

current_learning_growth.description: Current learning and growth indicators (employee engagement, capability gaps, technology maturity)

benchmarking_data.description: Competitive benchmarking data for target-setting calibration

prior_balanced_scorecard.description: Prior balanced scorecard or strategy map from previous planning cycle
